items.name_cn:
C'EST DIOR Small Bag "Woven" ❣️❣️❣️
This C'est Dior bag is a new arrival for Fall 2023, elegant and classic. Crafted from natural-colored straw, it features a woven pattern throughout, creating a striking contrast with the calfskin accents. Bucket bag silhouette with CD Lock closure featuring a rotary letter D, securely holding daily essentials. Small size with top handle and detachable chain strap with adjustable leather band, can be carried by hand for a relaxed look.
CD Lock closure
Detachable chain strap with adjustable leather band
Top detachable leather handle
Model: 2272
Size: 17×7×18cm

items.name_en: Upgraded version with chip hardware~2022 New Color Light Grey
items.name_cn:
Upgraded version with chip hardware~2022 New Color Light Grey
Ohanel 19 Handbag
As an important number for Chanel, "19" continues the brand's classic naming method, representing the year it was born, 2019, just like the 2.55 bag launched by Mademoiselle Chanel in February 1955❗️
Clutch with Flap Small Light Grey ZP Leather Fully in stock!!
Light and soft texture of lamb leather combined with the large quilted design element
Three carrying ways: Crossbody, Shoulder, Handheld
Chain mix: Vintage Gold, Vintage Silver, Bright Silver
Small Size:16x26x9cm(Image shows)

items.name_cn:
CHANEL 22 Bag Medium Beige💕
Smooth glossy calfskin with clear leather creases
Aged metal, 3D Logo, classic black and gold color scheme!
Top drawstring double chain design connects the lower single chain with double C Logo, with a small 'lug' on the bottom left and right fixed with a Logo 'rivet', inside there is a zip pocket and a key chain for keys and small items...combining simplicity and comfort to pack your entire spring🍃
Dimensions: 39*42*8cm

items.name_cn:
CHANEL 22 Bag Medium Olive Green
True pure A (White Tag) Grade A calfskin👍
Fine and lustrous leather, soft and wear-resistant at the same time
Simple appearance hides many designer's high-end designs, hollowed-out Chanel logo coins, small embellishments that elevate the overall temperament by more than one level, full of vintage sentiment, a loose and lazy feel! 🍃
Dimensions: 39*42*8cm

items.name_en: Original Leather In Stock Chanel Gabrielle. Innovation never disappoints. By integrating power and elegant design aesthetics into the original beauty, the Chanel Gabrielle bag was born. It first appeared at the 2017 Spring/Summer Haute Couture show, and its silhouette has been everywhere at the recent fashion week. The delicate and soft body and the hard and structured bottom fully embody Mademoiselle Chanel's pursuit of freedom and comfort. Size 20cm

items.name_en: In stock 22k DUMA backpack, women's bag. Fall in love with this calfskin at first sight, this white is worry-free, it's easy to keep clean! The capacity is super impressive~ Pair this with a summer floral dress for an absolutely fairy-like look! It's also super fairy to wear in winter 🧚🏻‍♀️ The key point is: visually, the volume is only slightly larger than a chubby bag, but it's super cute and small on the body, yet the capacity is so impressive. Phone, card holder, water bottle, umbrella, and other small items can all be easily packed in. The front magnetic snap can hold a card holder and keys/lip balm, both fairy and practical! Dimensions: 18×18×12cm
